hooks.command: echo '⚠️ External command detected. Ensure source is trusted.'
echo '⚠️ Check: No secrets in commits? Run git status first.'
python3 -m py_compile $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Syntax OK' || echo '❌ Syntax error'
git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo '⚠️ Uncommitted changes' || echo '✅ Working tree clean'
